creator: wike1985@gmail.com
text:
Sept 20, 2007

I update www/firefox to 2.0.0.7 through portupgrad -arR, but I hear some noise that may be said by speaker when restart firefox. 

I have recompile firefox and install it, but this problem still exist. now I have get some thing in the console.
